title: Sloorvival Server Modpack
body:
# **Survival mod pack made for the Sloorvival server, your server, or just playing single-player if that's your speed.**

```
mc.sloorjuice.com (Server will already be saved in server list)
```
**Survival is an open server anyone can join!**

This mod pack adds crazy game expansion, and the most important optimizations to enjoy minecraft at peak performance.

## **some highlights:**

**Open Parties and Claims:** Open up your world map (m) and right click to select some land (up to 10 chunks) and claim it to be your own, press (p) to open your Claim and Parties menu and press Player Config Menu > My Players Config to configure how people can interact with your land. Type "/openpac-parties create" to create party and "/openpac-parties invite {playername}" to invite players.

**Carry-On Mod:** Straight up pick chests even if it's full of items by holding (g) and right-clicking on the chest, also works for vanilla mobs.

**Biomes & Structures:** over 400+ new Structures and biomes between Biomes O' Plenty + Dungeons+ + Mo' Structures + Towns & Towers and more. Includes Nature's/Explorer's Compass to point you right to 'em.

**Mobs That Slap:** Friends & Foes (Forgotten Mob votes like moo blooms, copper golems). Mutant Monsters (Everyone's nostalgic over this), Illager Invasion (Tons of more illagers), From The Fog (Herobrine), and more.

**Build Flex:** Mr Crayfish Furniture (fridges, TVs, couches), Macaw's packs (roofs, bridges, windows), better Armor Statues, Bedspreads (banner designs on your bed)

**Food Empire:** 50+ crops, meals, and more with Farmer's Delight and Croptopia. Right Click Harvest + Tree Harvester for better farming.

**Combat Heat:** TONS of new weapons with Guns++ (flintlock pistols to rifles), Weapons Expanded, Axes Are Weapons, Spellbound Weapons (cursed swords). Along with Amethyst and Emerald gear

**QoL Godsends:** Lootr (Generated Loot Chests are player specific so everyone gets loot), Waystones (teleport pads), Replay Mod (clip your game).
Vanilla+ Vibes: Dragon Drops Elytra (no RNG tears), Gravestones (death recovery), Forgiving Void, etc.
